founding.title: What can be verified.
paragraphs: URBANA BEAUTY & BARBERSHOP in Houston has a public Square appointment page, but the supplied page text does not expose an owner, staff names, services, prices, or social profiles. Best next step is to verify the booking flow directly before calling.
No founding year, ownership story, or leadership claim is presented unless it was verified in the collected public sources.

standard.title: A clearer
paragraphs: The website concept prioritizes the information customers need before they call or book.
Verified facts remain distinct from controlled design language and approved visual assets.
